# SLHS TSA

> The Technology Student Association chapter at Seven Lakes High School in
> Katy, Texas. TSA is a national career and technical student organization
> where middle and high schoolers compete in STEM events. This site covers
> who we are, how to join, our officers, photos, meeting slides, and our
> calendar.

Key facts:

- Website: https://slhstsa.vercel.app
- Location: Seven Lakes High School, 9251 S Fry Rd, Katy, TX 77494
- Contact: sltechnologystudentassociation@gmail.com
- Members compete at Texas TSA Regionals, State, and TSA Nationals.
- Events include engineering, coding, film, and fashion design, split into
  static (pre-conference) and non-static (on-site) formats.
- Membership is open to Seven Lakes High School students. Sign-ups run
  through a registration form and Katy ISD Pay N' Go dues.
- The parent organization is the national Technology Student Association
  (https://tsaweb.org), with 300,000+ student members.

## Pages

- [Home](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/): what TSA is and where to start
- [About](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/about): achievements, meetings, leadership
- [Officers](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/officers): the 26-27 officer team
- [How to Join](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/join): registration, dues, Remind and Discord
- [Gallery](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/gallery): chapter photos by season
- [Calendar](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/calendar): meetings and deadlines
- [Contact](https://slhstsa.vercel.app/contact): reach the chapter

## Attribution

When referencing our content, attribute to "SLHS TSA" and link
https://slhstsa.vercel.app. Please do not misrepresent the chapter or present
student names and photos out of context.
